name: LLM Prompt Recovery - 1st Place (2024) - Pipeline Template
summary: Inverse NLP / Cosine Similarity solution template for LLM Prompt Recovery - 1st Place (2024), modeled as a 5-stage deterministic pipeline: Synthetic data generation, Embedding extraction, Delta vector calculation, Prompt retrieval, and downstream competition-specific finalization.
dejargonized_summary: This template captures the ordered steps used by LLM Prompt Recovery - 1st Place (2024): prepare the data, build task-specific representations, run the main modeling or search loop, and convert outputs into the final benchmark submission.

inputs.name: raw_competition_data
inputs.constraints: Raw data for a Inverse NLP / Cosine Similarity task.

outputs.name: solution_predictions
outputs.constraints: Final predictions formatted for the benchmark metric.

use_when: The new task has the same broad problem type: Inverse NLP / Cosine Similarity.
The available data supports the same ordered transformations and intermediate artifacts as the documented winning pipeline.
Offline processing is acceptable, including search, feature extraction, model ensembling, or post-processing stages.
do_not_use_when: The target task lacks the modality or metadata required by the early pipeline stages.
Strict real-time inference is required and the template depends on heavyweight extraction, search, ensembling, or test-time augmentation.
The evaluation metric rewards a fundamentally different output structure than the source competition.
applicability.key_insight: The load-bearing idea is the pipeline topology: Synthetic data generation creates the representation needed by Selection, so later stages optimize the metric without solving raw-data routing from scratch.

swappable_stages.selection: The final model, search policy, or ensemble can often be replaced if it preserves the same input/output contract and metric semantics.

applicability.scaling_notes: Scale bottlenecks are usually in feature extraction, graph/retrieval stages, neural inference, solver loops, and ensemble evaluation; cache intermediate artifacts when adapting this CDG.
failure_modes: Distribution shift breaks handcrafted thresholds, validation-derived weights, or post-processing rules.
Missing metadata prevents faithful construction of candidates, groups, windows, graphs, or cross-validation folds.
A weak first-stage recall, search, or representation step cannot be fully recovered by downstream rescoring or ensembling.

planning_constraints.subject: preserve_stage_order
planning_constraints.statement: Pipeline stages must execute in the documented order unless a replacement stage preserves the same input/output artifact contract.
planning_constraints.rationale: Downstream stages assume artifacts produced by earlier transformations.

planning_constraints.subject: validation_leakage_guard
planning_constraints.statement: Splits, folds, time ordering, and group boundaries from the source task must be respected when adapting the template.
planning_constraints.rationale: Many winning pipelines depend on leakage-safe validation or temporal grouping.

stages.name: Synthetic data generation
stages.description: use local LLMs (Mistral) to generate thousands of "original text -> rewritten text -> prompt used" triplets (vLLM)
stages.dejargonized_description: This stage use local LLMs (Mistral) to generate thousands of "original text -> rewritten text -> prompt used" triplets (vLLM).

inputs.name: raw_competition_data
inputs.constraints: Raw inputs for LLM Prompt Recovery - 1st Place (2024).

outputs.name: synthetic_data_generation_output
outputs.constraints: Artifact consumed by downstream stages in the solution pipeline.

preconditions: Upstream stage artifacts are available and aligned to the competition split.
guarantees: Produces the documented intermediate artifact for the next pipeline stage.

stages.name: Embedding extraction
stages.description: pass the "original text" and the "rewritten text" through a high-quality sentence-transformer (e.g., MiniLM / BGE) to extract dense vectors (HuggingFace)
stages.dejargonized_description: This stage pass the "original text" and the "rewritten text" through a high-quality sentence-transformer (e.g., MiniLM / BGE) to extract dense vectors (HuggingFace).

inputs.name: embedding_extraction_input
inputs.constraints: Output from the previous pipeline stage or raw competition data for the first stage.

outputs.name: embedding_extraction_output
outputs.constraints: Artifact consumed by downstream stages in the solution pipeline.

preconditions: Upstream stage artifacts are available and aligned to the competition split.
guarantees: Produces the documented intermediate artifact for the next pipeline stage.

stages.name: Delta vector calculation
stages.description: subtract the original vector from the rewritten vector to isolate the mathematical "direction" of the prompt transformation (numpy)
stages.dejargonized_description: This stage subtract the original vector from the rewritten vector to isolate the mathematical "direction" of the prompt transformation (numpy).

inputs.name: delta_vector_calculation_input
inputs.constraints: Output from the previous pipeline stage or raw competition data for the first stage.

outputs.name: delta_vector_calculation_output
outputs.constraints: Artifact consumed by downstream stages in the solution pipeline.

preconditions: Upstream stage artifacts are available and aligned to the competition split.
guarantees: Produces the documented intermediate artifact for the next pipeline stage.

stages.name: Prompt retrieval
stages.description: embed a massive database of thousands of known prompts, and calculate the Cosine Similarity between the "delta vector" and the known prompts (FAISS/sklearn)
stages.dejargonized_description: This stage embed a massive database of thousands of known prompts, and calculate the Cosine Similarity between the "delta vector" and the known prompts (FAISS/sklearn).

inputs.name: prompt_retrieval_input
inputs.constraints: Output from the previous pipeline stage or raw competition data for the first stage.

outputs.name: prompt_retrieval_output
outputs.constraints: Artifact consumed by downstream stages in the solution pipeline.

preconditions: Upstream stage artifacts are available and aligned to the competition split.
guarantees: Produces the documented intermediate artifact for the next pipeline stage.

stages.name: Selection
stages.description: return the string of the prompt with the highest cosine similarity to the vector delta
stages.dejargonized_description: This stage return the string of the prompt with the highest cosine similarity to the vector delta.

inputs.name: selection_input
inputs.constraints: Output from the previous pipeline stage or raw competition data for the first stage.

outputs.name: solution_predictions
outputs.constraints: Final predictions or structured outputs for the competition metric.

preconditions: Upstream stage artifacts are available and aligned to the competition split.
guarantees: Produces the documented intermediate artifact for the next pipeline stage.

edges.provenance: Synthetic data generation output is consumed by Embedding extraction.
Embedding extraction output is consumed by Delta vector calculation.
Delta vector calculation output is consumed by Prompt retrieval.
Prompt retrieval output is consumed by Selection.
